properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The Night was overwhelming Hope was dead on the cross Jesus had breathed his last The shadow's hold defeated Death was defeated

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: On the cross You gave Your life Pouring out a precious sacrifice You laid down in darkness Waging a war we could not win When the stone was rolled away The tomb was empty where Your baby laid Jesus is risen Jesus has overcome the grave God is with us

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: King of my salvation You paid the cost for my son Jesus, The Son of God Risen on the third day You conquered all my fear I know You're with me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Be unto Your name All the Blessing All the honour All the praise Forever an ever All the glory All the power All the strength
